on_screen_text:
English coaching class 5000 ரூபாய்ன்னு கேள்விப்பட்ட பிறகு. [After hearing that English coaching class is 5000 rupees.]
Mysivi 1ரூபாய்க்கு English சொல்லி கொடுக்குது தெரிந்த பிறகு. [After knowing that Mysivi teaches English for 1 rupee.]
summary: This meme-style ad uses split-screen comedy clips of actor Vadivelu to contrast the high cost of traditional English classes with Mysivi's affordable offering. The top panel depicts panic at a 5000-rupee price tag, while the bottom panel shows a confident, swaggering reaction to Mysivi's 1-rupee English lessons.
